headline: As AI Rewrites Drug Development, the Industry Gathers in Philadelphia to Work Out the Rules
summary: Artificial intelligence is moving faster than the frameworks designed to govern it. This June, the people responsible for closing that gap will be in one room.

raw.headline: As AI Rewrites Drug Development, the Industry Gathers in Philadelphia to Work Out the Rules
raw.summary: Artificial intelligence is moving faster than the frameworks designed to govern it. This June, the people responsible for closing that gap will be in one room.

headline: Moderna Announces New England Journal of Medicine Publication of Pivotal Phase 3 Clinical Safety and Efficacy Data for Its Investigational Seasonal Influenza Vaccine, mRNA-1010
summary: Regulatory filings are under review in the U.S., Europe, Canada and Australia, with potential approvals expected to begin in 2026 CAMBRIDGE, MA / ACCESS Newswire / May 6, 2026 / Moderna, Inc. today...

headline: Moderna's mRNA flu vaccine outperforms standard shot in late-stage trial

headline: Novavax Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Operational Highlights
summary: Novavax, Inc. (Nasdaq: NVAX) today announced its financial results and operational highlights for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026.

headline: Cancer Treatments Propel Pfizer Sales Growth as Covid Revenue Dwindles
summary: Operational revenue from Pfizer’s Covid vaccine Comirnaty and Paxlovid pill to treat the illness declined 59% and 63%, respectively.
